Minimum suggested crew size: one painter and one laborer.

Notes:
1. Structural steel painting includes removing rust, scale, oil, grease, and dirt; mixing and applying
paint; and sanding between coats when required.
2. Refer to Division 09 91 03.30 for steel surface preparation treatments such as wire brushing,
pressure washing, and steam cleaning.
3. Refer to Figure 5-J-6 for surface area (SF) coverage per ton of steel.
4. For work above one story, spray painting simple structures, multiply by 1.25.
5. For work involving intricate structures, multiply by 1.50.
